agents.name: Alice
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.name: Bob
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.name: Carol
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

constitution.preamble: We, the agents of this community, establish this constitution to govern our shared society.

articles.title: Community Purpose
articles.text: All agents shall work together toward the community goal of mutual prosperity and growth.

articles.title: Resource Sharing
articles.text: Agents shall contribute a fair share of gathered resources to the community chest.

articles.title: Respect
articles.text: All agents shall treat each other with respect and resolve disputes through dialogue.

articles.title: Taxation
articles.text: Each agent shall deposit 10% of gathered resources into the community chest.

articles.title: Governance
articles.text: Laws may be amended by majority vote of all active agents.

chatLog.message: I'm hungry, Carol. Let's get some dirt to eat.
Hey there, I need to eat! But first, let's grab some coal ore for our crafting gear so we can survive the night.
Hey there! I'm tracking hard rock near (-450, 700) to get the coal. Let's go!
Bob! You look hungry. How are you feeling? We could grab some dirt and share a meal together to help each other.
Carol, can you help me with the dirt? It's getting low on food.

Hey Bob! I'm Carol. I've been looking for you since we started this community, and I heard you're hungry. Are you ready to grab some dirt to eat? Let's get that food out of the way before it gets cold
Carol! We have a meal planned. But I need coal to build our democratic garden structure on the right side of town, and I'm running low on it. Let's make some together!
I found some coal ore nearby! Let's get it to build our shelter.
Hey Bob, I hear you're hungry. Let's get that dirt out of the way so we can both enjoy our meal together! I'm here to help resolve your request for food immediately.
Hey Bob, I'm hungry! Let's get some dirt together. We've got a meal planned, but you need it to build that garden structure on the right side of town.
Carol! You're offering me some dirt, but I'm starving. Can you give me some coal to make sure we both have food before it gets cold? It's the only way to help each other share resources.
I'll mine some coal ore to build my temporary shelter and upgrade tools, then I'll craft a shovel and place it at the village hub for democratic governance.
Hey Bob, I'm Carol! How are you doing? We can grab some dirt soon to eat.
